context: Checkpoint 2026-06-27. Runtime-agent plugin distribution remains private, but pi-agent now has explicit package artifact guardrails for future publication.
current_tasks: packages/pi-agent/package.json now allowlists concrete artifacts only: dist/pi_agent.wasm, dist/plugin.json, and dist/jco.

scripts/validate-packages.mjs now validates @refarm.dev/pi-agent as a runtime-agent plugin package candidate: artifact files must be explicit, build:wasm must run check:wit and write wasm/plugin.json, build:jco must read wasm and write dist/jco, and public publication requires publishConfig.access=public.

Validation passed: node --test scripts/ci/test-validate-packages-lib.mjs, node scripts/validate-packages.mjs, git diff --check, pnpm run reference-driver:smoke, after-edit, commit, and after-commit; after-edit/after-commit also passed the no-token refarm:agent:e2e:mock.
next_actions: Map the WIT/component distribution path for refarm:agent-tools and refarm:plugin before touching npm/crates publishing.
Keep @refarm.dev/pi-agent private until plugin artifact policy and daily-driver gate justify a package candidate.
Consider adding a plan-only/publication preflight for plugin packages so future agents can inspect candidate status without building WASM.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
